concepts.headline: Essential books for product builders.
concepts.subtext: Curated by jobs-to-be-done. Three books per category, every one completed.
data_points: Strategy: books that sharpen how you think
Leadership: books that shape how you lead
Execution: books that change how you build
Communication: books that refine how you persuade
Systems: books that reveal how things scale
Culture: books that define how teams work
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero layout on a #faf9f6 canvas. Eyebrow label 'PRODUCT READING LIST' in 11px DM Mono uppercase at top-left, 64px from edges. Headline in 48px Inter 600 at -0.03em tracking, left-aligned, spanning 55% of canvas width. Below headline, a 2px #d7c8af accent bar, 120px wide, fading to transparent. Six stacked list rows below, each with a square 18px number marker in #e5e5e5 fill with #333 numeral, category title in 15px Inter 600, and descriptor in 14px Inter 400 #555. Rows have 20px vertical gap. Right 40% of canvas holds a sparse particle dot network at 0.08 opacity. FLYWHEEL wordmark bottom-left at 0.03 opacity. 64px padding all edges.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, headline #111, list titles #333, descriptors #555, number badges #e5e5e5, accent bar #d7c8af, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.08 opacity, eyebrow label #888
concepts.reasoning: The post is explicitly a curated list organized by category, making numbered_list_graphic the natural fit. Six categories map cleanly to the format, and the jobs-to-be-done framing gives each row a purposeful structure.

concepts.headline: Read books that have stood the test of time.
concepts.subtext: The best signal-to-noise ratio in product development: three books per category, all completed.
concepts.layout_description: Centered statement layout on #ffffff canvas with FLYWHEEL watermark at 0.03 opacity behind the main text. Single bold statement in 52px Inter 600 at -0.04em tracking, centered horizontally, spanning 70% of canvas width, breaking across two lines for visual rhythm. Subtext in 17px Inter 400 #555, centered, below with 32px gap. A thin 2px #d7c8af horizontal rule 80px wide centered between headline and subtext. Small 'FLYWHEEL' brand mark in 11px DM Mono uppercase at bottom-center, 64px from edge. Generous vertical padding gives the statement room to breathe. Particle dots at extreme left and right periphery at 0.06 opacity, never encroaching on center.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff, headline #111, subtext #555, accent rule #d7c8af, watermark #000 at 0.03 opacity, brand mark #888, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.06 opacity
concepts.reasoning: Andreessen's insight about reading books over 10 years old is the most quotable, memorable idea in the post. Isolating it as a bold statement gives the graphic a provocative editorial hook that invites engagement and shares easily.

concepts.headline: Signal over noise, three books at a time.
concepts.subtext: A curated reading list for product builders, organized by jobs-to-be-done. Only books that made the cut.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero on #faf9f6 canvas. Eyebrow in 11px DM Mono uppercase 'PRODUCT BUILDER READING LIST' at top-left, 64px from edges. Headline in 50px Inter 600 at -0.03em tracking, left-aligned, 58% canvas width, two-line break. Subtext in 18px Inter 400 #555 below with 28px gap. Below subtext, a horizontal row of six small square category badges, each 80x28px, #f0efe9 fill, 0px border-radius, 1px #e5e5e5 border, category name in 10px DM Mono uppercase #666. Badges sit flush left with 8px gaps between them. Thin 2px #d7c8af accent bar above headline, 100px wide. Right 38% of canvas is open negative space with a faint particle dot cluster at 0.07 opacity. Flywheel mark bottom-left at 0.03 opacity. 64px padding all edges.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, headline #111, subtext #555, category badges #f0efe9 with #e5e5e5 border and #666 text, accent bar #d7c8af, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.07 opacity, eyebrow #888
concepts.reasoning: The headline distills the post's core editorial philosophy into a memorable phrase, while the category badges give viewers a tangible preview of the list's structure without crowding the layout.

selection_reasoning: The numbered_list_graphic directly mirrors the post's core structure: a curated, categorized list organized by jobs-to-be-done. It gives viewers immediate utility by surfacing the six categories while maintaining Flywheel's editorial restraint through generous spacing, muted palette, and sparse particle texture. The bold statement card is compelling but loses the list's organizational value. The headline subtext card is clean but less distinctive. Concept 0 best earns every element's place on the canvas.
